description: Canonical DMOS feature flags manifest (P2-3). This is the single source of truth for all feature flags across UI and backend.

flags.name: AI Features Enabled
flags.description: Enables AI-powered generation features: strategy, ad-copy, SOW generation

flags.name: Google Ads Connector Enabled
flags.description: Enables the Google Ads connector runtime

flags.name: Kill Switch Enabled
flags.description: Enables kill-switch enforcement. Must always be true in production

flags.name: Rollback Workflow Enabled
flags.description: Enables the rollback and compensating-action workflow

flags.name: Dashboard Growth Metrics
flags.description: Enables growth metrics widget on the dashboard

scopes.both: Available in both UI and backend

notes: All flags should be read from this manifest. Do not add flags directly to DmosFeatureFlags.java or ui/src/lib/feature-flags.ts without updating this manifest first.
